name: Northflank
description: Cloud platform for deploying and managing services. Monitor infrastructure.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Northflank at https://app.northflank.com
2. Go to Account Settings > API
3. Click Create new token
4. Give it a name and select Read permissions
5. Copy the token and paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Your Northflank API token. Go to Account Settings > API > Create new token.

checks.name: Northflank App Availability
checks.description: Checks that the Northflank API is accessible with the provided credentials.

checks.name: Northflank Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies employee access to Northflank via API.
